name: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
notes:
This Building Block triggers when a communication to a cryptocurrency mining host is detected.

Note: Populate the Cryptocurrency Mining Hosts with relevant URLs.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A
when any of HTTP Host are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Hosts - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A
AND when any of HTTP Host are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Hosts - AlphaNumeric
